arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AppConfig environment.

description.description: A brief description of the AppConfig environment.

id.description: The unique identifier for the AppConfig environment.

monitor.description: A set of monitoring configurations, including alarm ARNs and roles, for the AppConfig environment.

name.description: The name of the AppConfig environment.

state.description: The current state of the AppConfig environment, such as READY or DEPLOYING.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AppConfig environment.
